name: Consumer Credit Counseling Services
description_short: Lancaster's Consumer Credit Counseling Services at 308 E King St provides free debt counseling and financial guidance to residents.
description_long:
Consumer Credit Counseling Services operates from 308 E King St, Suite 1 in downtown Lancaster, PA. The office is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM, and closed on weekends. This standalone location serves Lancaster residents and small business owners seeking free financial counseling and debt management support.

At this Lancaster office, certified credit counselors provide debt management planning, budget analysis, and creditor negotiation support at no cost. Call 717-397-5182 to schedule an appointment or get immediate financial advice. The team specializes in helping Lancaster-area residents resolve credit challenges, consolidate debts, and avoid predatory lending traps.

If you're struggling with credit card debt, medical bills, or a sudden financial hardship in Lancaster, PA, bring your recent statements and a valid ID to your first appointment. Consumer Credit Counseling Services is a nonprofit organization committed to helping local families regain financial stability without hidden fees.
pros: Completely free initial credit counseling session and budget consultation with no obligation
Certified credit counselors conduct one-on-one personalized financial reviews
Bilingual services available in English and Spanish
Free access to budgeting tools, debt tracking resources, and financial education materials
Structured four-step process that clearly outlines what to expect from counseling
Focus on negotiating lower interest rates and consolidating multiple payments into one monthly payment
Non-profit organization model aligned with consumer benefit rather than profit maximization
cons: Website mentions 'Service Fee' for ongoing programs without transparent pricing disclosure upfront
Does not provide credit repair or dispute services for errors on credit reports
Cannot provide legal advice, limiting value for consumers facing debt-related lawsuits or bankruptcy
Claims about reducing collection calls and legal action are conditional on full, on-time payments—not guaranteed
404 errors on subpages (credit-services URLs) suggest incomplete website functionality and potential reliability concerns
best_for: Consumers with multiple credit card debts seeking to consolidate payments and lower interest rates
Individuals looking for free financial literacy and budgeting guidance without upfront costs
Spanish-speaking consumers needing bilingual credit counseling support
People overwhelmed by debt who need structured guidance to create a repayment plan
diagnosis: Consumer Credit Counseling Services is best for consumers with manageable debt loads who need help creating a repayment strategy, understanding their finances, and potentially negotiating lower rates—particularly those who cannot afford paid credit counseling. The primary caveat is that ongoing services appear to have fees despite free initial consultations, and the organization does not address credit report errors or provide legal assistance, limiting its utility for consumers facing collection lawsuits or complex credit disputes.
services: Free initial credit card debt review and budget consultation
Debt analysis and interest rate assessment
Personalized debt repayment and relief plan creation
Debt consolidation planning (multiple payments to one monthly payment)
Budgeting tools and debt tracking resources
Financial education and credit management training
Ongoing support and guidance to maintain debt-free status
FAQ resources addressing common credit counseling questions
Educational blog content on credit counseling topics
meta_description: Consumer Credit Counseling Services at 308 E King St, Lancaster, PA. Free debt counseling and credit management for local residents.
